form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 3 m finishing third behind Call Me It at this track over 1609m on March 22 at $5.55. Then a handy effort when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Diamond Ryder at Western Fair Raceway over 1609m in a G on March 27 at $14.40. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th over 1609m at this track was 7th- at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Saulsbrook Ian (1:53.00) on March 28 at $74.95. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 2 m at this track (1:53.20) beating Skylar in on March 22 at $19.20 at the bell was 2nd-. Recent form okay so worth considering.

form.formComment: Six-year-old entire is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1609m. Last start won by a 0.5 m as favourite at this track (1:52.40) beating Cant Stop Lou in HCP on April 5 at $3.55 at the bell was 5th-. Hard to fault on recent form.
